name: 24/7 Golf Haslett
about: 24/7 Golf Haslett is an indoor golf and pickleball facility located at 2121 Haslett Rd in Haslett, MI. The venue offers four golf simulator bays available for hourly rental, providing a convenient option for golfers to play regardless of weather conditions. The facility is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, allowing for flexible scheduling for individuals, groups, and parties. While primarily focused on golf and pickleball, the venue does not mention in-house food or drink service beyond a potential BYOB policy.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access provides maximum flexibility for any schedule
Top-of-the-line Trackman iO technology for accurate shot data
Available for private parties and corporate events

Multiple locations provide convenient options around Lansing

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest technology using radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging for real-time ball and club data.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own. It is recommended to call them directly to confirm.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not have a clear policy on outside food and drink. While no in-house bar or kitchen is mentioned, it's best to check their FAQ or contact them directly regarding BYOB policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an average time for playing 18 holes, as this will depend on the number of players in your bay and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, mentioning that you can bring a friend or a group, and hosting work parties and other events suggests a family-friendly atmosphere.
